name: Funstival Koulouria
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter with sugar in an electric mixer, adding sugar slowly. Beat until the consistency of whipped cream.
2. Add vanilla extract, then eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Remove from mixer and fold in 4 cups of flour sifted together with baking powder using a wooden spoon or rubber spatula.
4. Knead remaining flour, 1/2 cup at a time, until a soft non-sticky dough is achieved. If large eggs are used, add a little more flour as needed.
5. Pinch off dough the size of a walnut and roll pencil thin. Fold in half side by side and twist.
6. Brush each piece with beaten egg yolk and press sesame seeds on each cookie.
7. Place cookies on baking sheets and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
Makes 50 to 60 cookies.
